description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on every push to master and develop branches and on pull requests to these branches. Use a matrix strategy to test with multiple Python versions (3.9 to 3.13) on an ubuntu-latest environment. For each Python version, install Poetry, set up Python, install dependencies, check code with ruff, check typing with mypy, and run tests with pytest. Additionally, run a notify job that depends on the tests job and sends a notification to a Slack channel using a provided token.
